# Thailand Administrative Divisions — Full Reference

> Complete dataset of Thailand's 4-level administrative hierarchy organized by province.
> Last updated: 2026-05-12. License: CC-BY-4.0.

## Per-Province Data Files

Each file below contains all divisions for that province, including
districts, subdistricts, and villages.

- [กรุงเทพมหานคร (Bangkok)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/bangkok.txt) — 50 districts, 154 subdistricts, 0 villages
- [สมุทรปราการ (Samut Prakan)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/samut-prakan.txt) — 6 districts, 50 subdistricts, 577 villages
- [นนทบุรี (Nonthaburi)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nonthaburi.txt) — 6 districts, 52 subdistricts, 641 villages
- [ปทุมธานี (Pathum Thani)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/pathum-thani.txt) — 7 districts, 60 subdistricts, 867 villages
- [พระนครศรีอยุธยา (Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phra-nakhon-si-ayutthaya.txt) — 16 districts, 207 subdistricts, 1,553 villages
- [อ่างทอง (Ang Thong)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/ang-thong.txt) — 7 districts, 73 subdistricts, 545 villages
- [ลพบุรี (Loburi)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/loburi.txt) — 11 districts, 121 subdistricts, 1,168 villages
- [สิงห์บุรี (Sing Buri)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/sing-buri.txt) — 6 districts, 43 subdistricts, 378 villages
- [ชัยนาท (Chai Nat)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chai-nat.txt) — 8 districts, 53 subdistricts, 527 villages
- [สระบุรี (Saraburi)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/saraburi.txt) — 13 districts, 109 subdistricts, 1,049 villages
- [ชลบุรี (Chon Buri)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chon-buri.txt) — 11 districts, 92 subdistricts, 961 villages
- [ระยอง (Rayong)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/rayong.txt) — 8 districts, 56 subdistricts, 530 villages
- [จันทบุรี (Chanthaburi)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chanthaburi.txt) — 10 districts, 76 subdistricts, 770 villages
- [ตราด (Trat)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/trat.txt) — 7 districts, 37 subdistricts, 264 villages
- [ฉะเชิงเทรา (Chachoengsao)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chachoengsao.txt) — 11 districts, 93 subdistricts, 924 villages
- [ปราจีนบุรี (Prachin Buri)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/prachin-buri.txt) — 7 districts, 64 subdistricts, 720 villages
- [นครนายก (Nakhon Nayok)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nakhon-nayok.txt) — 4 districts, 41 subdistricts, 434 villages
- [สระแก้ว (Sa Kaeo)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/sa-kaeo.txt) — 9 districts, 59 subdistricts, 770 villages
- [นครราชสีมา (Nakhon Ratchasima)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nakhon-ratchasima.txt) — 32 districts, 285 subdistricts, 3,786 villages
- [บุรีรัมย์ (Buri Ram)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/buri-ram.txt) — 23 districts, 189 subdistricts, 2,587 villages
- [สุรินทร์ (Surin)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/surin.txt) — 17 districts, 159 subdistricts, 2,161 villages
- [ศรีสะเกษ (Si Sa Ket)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/si-sa-ket.txt) — 22 districts, 204 subdistricts, 2,668 villages
- [อุบลราชธานี (Ubon Ratchathani)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/ubon-ratchathani.txt) — 25 districts, 219 subdistricts, 2,886 villages
- [ยโสธร (Yasothon)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/yasothon.txt) — 9 districts, 79 subdistricts, 908 villages
- [ชัยภูมิ (Chaiyaphum)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chaiyaphum.txt) — 16 districts, 124 subdistricts, 1,645 villages
- [อำนาจเจริญ (Amnat Charoen)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/amnat-charoen.txt) — 7 districts, 56 subdistricts, 638 villages
- [บึงกาฬ (Buogkan)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/buogkan.txt) — 8 districts, 53 subdistricts, 617 villages
- [หนองบัวลำภู (Nong Bua Lam Phu)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nong-bua-lam-phu.txt) — 6 districts, 59 subdistricts, 721 villages
- [ขอนแก่น (Khon Kaen)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/khon-kaen.txt) — 26 districts, 199 subdistricts, 2,484 villages
- [อุดรธานี (Udon Thani)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/udon-thani.txt) — 20 districts, 155 subdistricts, 2,036 villages
- [เลย (Loei)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/loei.txt) — 14 districts, 90 subdistricts, 967 villages
- [หนองคาย (Nong Khai)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nong-khai.txt) — 9 districts, 62 subdistricts, 740 villages
- [มหาสารคาม (Maha Sarakham)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/maha-sarakham.txt) — 13 districts, 133 subdistricts, 1,961 villages
- [ร้อยเอ็ด (Roi Et)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/roi-et.txt) — 20 districts, 192 subdistricts, 2,456 villages
- [กาฬสินธุ์ (Kalasin)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/kalasin.txt) — 18 districts, 134 subdistricts, 1,625 villages
- [สกลนคร (Sakon Nakhon)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/sakon-nakhon.txt) — 18 districts, 125 subdistricts, 1,564 villages
- [นครพนม (Nakhon Phanom)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nakhon-phanom.txt) — 12 districts, 95 subdistricts, 1,124 villages
- [มุกดาหาร (Mukdahan)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/mukdahan.txt) — 7 districts, 53 subdistricts, 553 villages
- [เชียงใหม่ (Chiang Mai)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chiang-mai.txt) — 25 districts, 199 subdistricts, 2,127 villages
- [ลำพูน (Lamphun)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/lamphun.txt) — 8 districts, 51 subdistricts, 594 villages
- [ลำปาง (Lampang)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/lampang.txt) — 13 districts, 97 subdistricts, 1,025 villages
- [อุตรดิตถ์ (Uttaradit)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/uttaradit.txt) — 9 districts, 67 subdistricts, 635 villages
- [แพร่ (Phrae)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phrae.txt) — 8 districts, 78 subdistricts, 726 villages
- [น่าน (Nan)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nan.txt) — 15 districts, 99 subdistricts, 921 villages
- [พะเยา (Phayao)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phayao.txt) — 9 districts, 68 subdistricts, 820 villages
- [เชียงราย (Chiang Rai)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chiang-rai.txt) — 18 districts, 123 subdistricts, 1,817 villages
- [แม่ฮ่องสอน (Mae Hong Son)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/mae-hong-son.txt) — 7 districts, 44 subdistricts, 413 villages
- [นครสวรรค์ (Nakhon Sawan)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nakhon-sawan.txt) — 15 districts, 130 subdistricts, 1,535 villages
- [อุทัยธานี (Uthai Thani)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/uthai-thani.txt) — 8 districts, 69 subdistricts, 650 villages
- [กำแพงเพชร (Kamphaeng Phet)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/kamphaeng-phet.txt) — 11 districts, 78 subdistricts, 990 villages
- [ตาก (Tak)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/tak.txt) — 9 districts, 60 subdistricts, 588 villages
- [สุโขทัย (Sukhothai)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/sukhothai.txt) — 9 districts, 86 subdistricts, 866 villages
- [พิษณุโลก (Phitsanulok)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phitsanulok.txt) — 9 districts, 93 subdistricts, 1,112 villages
- [พิจิตร (Phichit)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phichit.txt) — 12 districts, 88 subdistricts, 930 villages
- [เพชรบูรณ์ (Phetchabun)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phetchabun.txt) — 11 districts, 116 subdistricts, 1,456 villages
- [ราชบุรี (Ratchaburi)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/ratchaburi.txt) — 10 districts, 104 subdistricts, 1,046 villages
- [กาญจนบุรี (Kanchanaburi)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/kanchanaburi.txt) — 13 districts, 95 subdistricts, 980 villages
- [สุพรรณบุรี (Suphan Buri)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/suphan-buri.txt) — 10 districts, 109 subdistricts, 1,037 villages
- [นครปฐม (Nakhon Pathom)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nakhon-pathom.txt) — 7 districts, 106 subdistricts, 1,079 villages
- [สมุทรสาคร (Samut Sakhon)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/samut-sakhon.txt) — 3 districts, 40 subdistricts, 359 villages
- [สมุทรสงคราม (Samut Songkhram)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/samut-songkhram.txt) — 3 districts, 36 subdistricts, 308 villages
- [เพชรบุรี (Phetchaburi)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phetchaburi.txt) — 8 districts, 92 subdistricts, 739 villages
- [ประจวบคีรีขันธ์ (Prachuap Khiri Khan)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/prachuap-khiri-khan.txt) — 8 districts, 48 subdistricts, 489 villages
- [นครศรีธรรมราช (Nakhon Si Thammarat)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/nakhon-si-thammarat.txt) — 23 districts, 169 subdistricts, 1,636 villages
- [กระบี่ (Krabi)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/krabi.txt) — 8 districts, 52 subdistricts, 397 villages
- [พังงา (Phangnga)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phangnga.txt) — 8 districts, 48 subdistricts, 337 villages
- [ภูเก็ต (Phuket)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phuket.txt) — 3 districts, 16 subdistricts, 137 villages
- [สุราษฎร์ธานี (Surat Thani)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/surat-thani.txt) — 19 districts, 130 subdistricts, 1,315 villages
- [ระนอง (Ranong)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/ranong.txt) — 5 districts, 30 subdistricts, 198 villages
- [ชุมพร (Chumphon)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/chumphon.txt) — 8 districts, 70 subdistricts, 798 villages
- [สงขลา (Songkhla)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/songkhla.txt) — 16 districts, 127 subdistricts, 1,325 villages
- [สตูล (Satun)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/satun.txt) — 7 districts, 36 subdistricts, 300 villages
- [ตรัง (Trang)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/trang.txt) — 10 districts, 90 subdistricts, 809 villages
- [พัทลุง (Phatthalung)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/phatthalung.txt) — 11 districts, 65 subdistricts, 715 villages
- [ปัตตานี (Pattani)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/pattani.txt) — 12 districts, 115 subdistricts, 684 villages
- [ยะลา (Yala)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/yala.txt) — 8 districts, 58 subdistricts, 449 villages
- [นราธิวาส (Narathiwat)](https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/narathiwat.txt) — 13 districts, 77 subdistricts, 671 villages

## Summary Statistics

| Province | Thai Name | Region | Districts | Subdistricts | Villages |
|----------|-----------|--------|-----------|--------------|----------|
| Bangkok | กรุงเทพมหานคร | Central | 50 | 154 | 0 |
| Samut Prakan | สมุทรปราการ | Central | 6 | 50 | 577 |
| Nonthaburi | นนทบุรี | Central | 6 | 52 | 641 |
| Pathum Thani | ปทุมธานี | Central | 7 | 60 | 867 |
| Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya | พระนครศรีอยุธยา | Central | 16 | 207 | 1,553 |
| Ang Thong | อ่างทอง | Central | 7 | 73 | 545 |
| Loburi | ลพบุรี | Central | 11 | 121 | 1,168 |
| Sing Buri | สิงห์บุรี | Central | 6 | 43 | 378 |
| Chai Nat | ชัยนาท | Central | 8 | 53 | 527 |
| Saraburi | สระบุรี | Central | 13 | 109 | 1,049 |
| Chon Buri | ชลบุรี | Eastern | 11 | 92 | 961 |
| Rayong | ระยอง | Eastern | 8 | 56 | 530 |
| Chanthaburi | จันทบุรี | Eastern | 10 | 76 | 770 |
| Trat | ตราด | Eastern | 7 | 37 | 264 |
| Chachoengsao | ฉะเชิงเทรา | Eastern | 11 | 93 | 924 |
| Prachin Buri | ปราจีนบุรี | Eastern | 7 | 64 | 720 |
| Nakhon Nayok | นครนายก | Central | 4 | 41 | 434 |
| Sa Kaeo | สระแก้ว | Eastern | 9 | 59 | 770 |
| Nakhon Ratchasima | นครราชสีมา | Northeastern | 32 | 285 | 3,786 |
| Buri Ram | บุรีรัมย์ | Northeastern | 23 | 189 | 2,587 |
| Surin | สุรินทร์ | Northeastern | 17 | 159 | 2,161 |
| Si Sa Ket | ศรีสะเกษ | Northeastern | 22 | 204 | 2,668 |
| Ubon Ratchathani | อุบลราชธานี | Northeastern | 25 | 219 | 2,886 |
| Yasothon | ยโสธร | Northeastern | 9 | 79 | 908 |
| Chaiyaphum | ชัยภูมิ | Northeastern | 16 | 124 | 1,645 |
| Amnat Charoen | อำนาจเจริญ | Northeastern | 7 | 56 | 638 |
| Buogkan | บึงกาฬ | Northeastern | 8 | 53 | 617 |
| Nong Bua Lam Phu | หนองบัวลำภู | Northeastern | 6 | 59 | 721 |
| Khon Kaen | ขอนแก่น | Northeastern | 26 | 199 | 2,484 |
| Udon Thani | อุดรธานี | Northeastern | 20 | 155 | 2,036 |
| Loei | เลย | Northeastern | 14 | 90 | 967 |
| Nong Khai | หนองคาย | Northeastern | 9 | 62 | 740 |
| Maha Sarakham | มหาสารคาม | Northeastern | 13 | 133 | 1,961 |
| Roi Et | ร้อยเอ็ด | Northeastern | 20 | 192 | 2,456 |
| Kalasin | กาฬสินธุ์ | Northeastern | 18 | 134 | 1,625 |
| Sakon Nakhon | สกลนคร | Northeastern | 18 | 125 | 1,564 |
| Nakhon Phanom | นครพนม | Northeastern | 12 | 95 | 1,124 |
| Mukdahan | มุกดาหาร | Northeastern | 7 | 53 | 553 |
| Chiang Mai | เชียงใหม่ | Northern | 25 | 199 | 2,127 |
| Lamphun | ลำพูน | Northern | 8 | 51 | 594 |
| Lampang | ลำปาง | Northern | 13 | 97 | 1,025 |
| Uttaradit | อุตรดิตถ์ | Northern | 9 | 67 | 635 |
| Phrae | แพร่ | Northern | 8 | 78 | 726 |
| Nan | น่าน | Northern | 15 | 99 | 921 |
| Phayao | พะเยา | Northern | 9 | 68 | 820 |
| Chiang Rai | เชียงราย | Northern | 18 | 123 | 1,817 |
| Mae Hong Son | แม่ฮ่องสอน | Northern | 7 | 44 | 413 |
| Nakhon Sawan | นครสวรรค์ | Central | 15 | 130 | 1,535 |
| Uthai Thani | อุทัยธานี | Central | 8 | 69 | 650 |
| Kamphaeng Phet | กำแพงเพชร | Central | 11 | 78 | 990 |
| Tak | ตาก | Western | 9 | 60 | 588 |
| Sukhothai | สุโขทัย | Central | 9 | 86 | 866 |
| Phitsanulok | พิษณุโลก | Central | 9 | 93 | 1,112 |
| Phichit | พิจิตร | Central | 12 | 88 | 930 |
| Phetchabun | เพชรบูรณ์ | Central | 11 | 116 | 1,456 |
| Ratchaburi | ราชบุรี | Western | 10 | 104 | 1,046 |
| Kanchanaburi | กาญจนบุรี | Western | 13 | 95 | 980 |
| Suphan Buri | สุพรรณบุรี | Central | 10 | 109 | 1,037 |
| Nakhon Pathom | นครปฐม | Central | 7 | 106 | 1,079 |
| Samut Sakhon | สมุทรสาคร | Central | 3 | 40 | 359 |
| Samut Songkhram | สมุทรสงคราม | Central | 3 | 36 | 308 |
| Phetchaburi | เพชรบุรี | Western | 8 | 92 | 739 |
| Prachuap Khiri Khan | ประจวบคีรีขันธ์ | Western | 8 | 48 | 489 |
| Nakhon Si Thammarat | นครศรีธรรมราช | Southern | 23 | 169 | 1,636 |
| Krabi | กระบี่ | Southern | 8 | 52 | 397 |
| Phangnga | พังงา | Southern | 8 | 48 | 337 |
| Phuket | ภูเก็ต | Southern | 3 | 16 | 137 |
| Surat Thani | สุราษฎร์ธานี | Southern | 19 | 130 | 1,315 |
| Ranong | ระนอง | Southern | 5 | 30 | 198 |
| Chumphon | ชุมพร | Southern | 8 | 70 | 798 |
| Songkhla | สงขลา | Southern | 16 | 127 | 1,325 |
| Satun | สตูล | Southern | 7 | 36 | 300 |
| Trang | ตรัง | Southern | 10 | 90 | 809 |
| Phatthalung | พัทลุง | Southern | 11 | 65 | 715 |
| Pattani | ปัตตานี | Southern | 12 | 115 | 684 |
| Yala | ยะลา | Southern | 8 | 58 | 449 |
| Narathiwat | นราธิวาส | Southern | 13 | 77 | 671 |

- Dataset: https://github.com/open-admin-data/thailand-administrative-divisions
